pokemon:inkay.name: Inkay
pokemon:inkay.summary: It flashes the light-emitting spots on its body, which drains its opponent’s will to fight. It takes the opportunity to scuttle away and hide.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It flashes the light-emitting spots on its body, which drains its opponent’s will to fight. It takes the opportunity to scuttle away and hide.
Opponents who stare at the flashing of the light-emitting spots on its body become dazed and lose their will to fight.
By exposing foes to the blinking of its luminescent spots, Inkay demoralizes them, and then it seizes the chance to flee.
It spins while making its luminescent spots flash. These spots allow it to communicate with others by using different patterns of light.
When exchanging information with others of its kind, it flashes the light-emitting spots on its body in a complex rhythm.
It draws prey near with its blinking lights and then wraps them up in its long tentacles and holds them in place.
Opponents who stare at the flashing of the light-emitting spots on its body become dazed and lose their will to fight.
It flashes the light-emitting spots on its body, which drains its opponent’s will to fight. It takes the opportunity to scuttle away and hide.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It flashes the light-emitting spots on its body, which drains its opponent’s will to fight. It takes the opportunity to scuttle away and hide.

pokemon:malamar.name: Malamar
pokemon:malamar.summary: It lures its prey close with hypnotic motions, then wraps its tentacles around it before finishing it off with digestive fluids.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It lures its prey close with hypnotic motions, then wraps its tentacles around it before finishing it off with digestive fluids.
It wields the most compelling hypnotic powers of any Pokémon, and it forces others to do whatever it wants.
It’s said that Malamar’s hypnotic powers played a role in certain history-changing events.
Gazing at its luminescent spots will quickly induce a hypnotic state, putting the observer under Malamar’s control.
It flashes the pattern on its torso to control its prey and draw them in. The edges of its fins are supremely sharp.
When it comes to strong hypnosis, there’s an endless number of people who utilize Malamar for their nefarious deeds.
It wields the most compelling hypnotic powers of any Pokémon, and it forces others to do whatever it wants.
It lures its prey close with hypnotic motions, then wraps its tentacles around it before finishing it off with digestive fluids.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It lures its prey close with hypnotic motions, then wraps its tentacles around it before finishing it off with digestive fluids.
